title: Statistical standard for geographic areas 2018 | Stats NZ
content:
## Statistical standard for geographic areas 2018
07 December 2017, 10:45am
This statistical standard defines the Stats NZ input and output geographic classifications and describes their primary purposes, and sets out requirements and guidelines for the creation and maintenance of statistical geographies.
16 December 2022 : This standard has now been replaced by Statistical standard for geographic areas 2023 .
Statistical standard for geographic areas 2018 (SSGA18) is to be used from 2018. It replaces the 1992 standard, which was published as the New Zealand Standard Areas Classification 1992 (NZSAC92).
Statistical standard for meshblock is part of SSGA18.
- Statistical standard for geographic areas 2018 Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 644 KB
